name: Hermes Sandbox
postCreateCommand: HERMES_SKIP_SETUP=1 bash -c 'curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash' && source ~/.bashrc && echo '✅ Hermes installed. Now run: hermes setup'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'source ~/.bashrc && if command -v hermes >/dev/null 2>&1; then nohup hermes gateway > /tmp/hermes-gateway.log 2>&1 & echo "✅ Hermes gateway starting"; else echo "ℹ️  Run hermes setup first"; fi'
